description: Whiteout Survival is a survival strategy game where players manage a city in a glacial apocalypse, assigning survivors to roles like hunter or cook to gather resources and maintain their well-being. Core mechanics involve strategic resource acquisition from the ice field and deploying recruited heroes with unique talents in combat against beasts and rival chiefs. Progression centers on expanding the city, developing new technologies from scratch, and upgrading heroes through a tap-based menu interface. Players aim to conquer the ice field and achieve the "Strongest" title by strategically managing resources, overcoming environmental challenges, and engaging in warfare. Multiplayer features allow players to form or join alliances, cooperating to dominate the battlefield and compete for global rankings.
